chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 36 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 26.04.2024 Petitioner Illahi Bux present in person Respondent No.5, namely, Abdul Jabbar present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Ashfaque Ahmed of PS Khanpur Mahar >>>>>..<<<<< This petition has been filed, allegedly, against harassment by the police at the instance of private respondents No.5 to 7. Private respondent No.5, namely Abdul Jabbar is present and undertakes that no harassment has been caused by him nor would be caused. There is a civil dispute between the parties, which is pending adjudication before the Civil Court, Ghotki. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of by directing police officials to act in accordance with law. Judge ARBROHI
